content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTIC' S COMMISSION

P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sa'' .nto, CA 95812-0807

(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

November 6, 2000


Lee Ann Adams
4465 David Way
San Bernardino, CA 92404


Re:    Your Request for Assistance
       Our File No. 00-185

Dear Ms. Adams:

       This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the conflict of
interest provisions of the Political Reform Act ("the Act").¹ The Act requires the
Commission to provide written advice to any person whose duties under the Act are in
question or to that person's authorized representative. (Section 83114(b); Regulation
18329(b)(1), enclosed.) Formal written advice is the application of the law to a particular
set of facts provided by the requestor and has the purpose of conferring immunity on the
requestor. (Section 83114(b); Regulation 18329(b)(7).) As such, the Commission does
not respond to requests relating to past conduct. (Section 83114(b); Regulation
18329(b)(8)(A).) The Commission may decline to provide informal assistance in such a
situation as well. (Section 83114(b); Regulation 18329(c)(4)(A).)

       Based on the facts included in your correspondence, we conclude that advice on
your question would necessarily relate to past conduct. Therefore, the Commission
declines to issue advice on this matter. However, our decision to decline to provide
formal or informal advice is not a determination that we have reached a conclusion
regarding the question posed in your request.

       For your information, we have enclosed two FPPC fact sheets entitled "Can I
Vote? Conflicts of Interest Overview" and "Overview of California's Conflict of Interest
Law," which provide general information on the conflict of interest rules. We hope this
information will be useful to you.


¹ Government Code sections 81000 - 91015. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-
18996, of the California Code of Regulations.

File No. 00-185
Page No. 2


If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916)
322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel

By: Margaret E. Figeroa
Political Reform Consultant

Enclosures
